document_title: Schedule of Base Unit Market Values for Residential, Commercial and Industrial Lands — Natonin

_meta.source: Provincial Assessor's Office — Natonin schedule (transcribed from lib/natonin.js)
_meta.act: RA 12001 (Real Property Valuation and Assessment Reform Act), Section 15
notes: Mirrors NATONIN_CLASSIFICATIONS in lib/natonin.js so the editor's class chips and the printed legend stay in sync.
Barangays Balangao and Banawal appear in R-6 and R-8 only; no commercial class touches them.
PSA spelling 'Banawal' is preserved; LGU schedule occasionally uses 'Banawel' (alias handled in lib/natonin.js).

items.location_description: Commercial lots along the all-weather road within Poblacion, and along the National Road within Saliok.
Residential lots along the all-weather road within Poblacion.
Residential lots within the inner part of Poblacion.
Residential lots along the National Road within Butac, Santa Isabel, Alunogan, and Pudo.
Residential lots along the National Road within Tonglayan and Banao.
Residential lots along the Saliok-Maducayan Provincial Road.
Residential lots along the all-weather roads within Balangao and Banawal, and within the inner part of Butac, Santa Isabel, Alunogan, and Pudo.
Residential lots within the inner part of Tonglayan, Banao, and Saliok.
Residential lots within the inner part of Maducayan, Balangao, and Banawal.
